form.label: Pannes en cours
form.description: Surveillance en temps réel des pannes électriques au Québec

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_timestamp) as derniere_collecte by region | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | table region | sort region

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" | stats latest(bis_timestamp) as derniere_collecte by municipalite | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | table municipalite | sort municipalite

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | eventstats latest(bis_id) as dernier_bis_id | where bis_id = dernier_bis_id | dedup id_panne | stats count as pannes_actives

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | eventstats latest(bis_id) as dernier_bis_id | where bis_id = dernier_bis_id | dedup id_panne | stats sum(nombre_clients) as clients_affectes

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | eval debut_epoch=strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_epoch >= (now() - 3600) | dedup id_panne | stats count

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | eval debut_epoch = strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval duree_minutes = round((now() - debut_epoch) / 60, 0) | stats avg(duree_minutes) as duree_moyenne | eval duree_moyenne = round(duree_moyenne, 0) | fields duree_moyenne

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | eval debut_epoch = strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where (now() - debut_epoch) >= 7200 | stats sum(nombre_clients) as clients_affectes| appendpipe [stats count | where count=0 | eval clients_affectes=0] | fields - count

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | eval debut_epoch = strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where (now() - debut_epoch) >= 21600 | stats sum(nombre_clients) as clients_affectes| appendpipe [stats count | where count=0 | eval clients_affectes=0] | fields - count

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | eval debut_epoch = strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where (now() - debut_epoch) >= 43200 | stats sum(nombre_clients) as clients_affectes| appendpipe [stats count | where count=0 | eval clients_affectes=0] | fields - count

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | eval debut_epoch = strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where (now() - debut_epoch) >= 86400 | stats sum(nombre_clients) as clients_affectes| appendpipe [stats count | where count=0 | eval clients_affectes=0] | fields - count

panel.title: Carte Géographique des Pannes au Québec

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | eval description = municipalite . " - " . nombre_clients . " clients" | geostats latfield=latitude longfield=longitude sum(nombre_clients) as clients by municipalite globallimit=0

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | stats count by cause_desc | sort - count | rename cause_desc as "Cause", count as "Nombre"

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | stats count by statut | sort - count | rename statut as "Statut", count as "Nombre"

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes | stats latest(bis_id) as bis_id | return bis_id] | dedup id_panne | stats sum(nombre_clients) as total_clients by region | sort - total_clients | head 5 | rename region as "Région", total_clients as "Clients affectés"

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | eventstats latest(bis_id) as dernier_bis_id | where bis_id = dernier_bis_id | dedup id_panne | stats sum(nombre_clients) as total_clients by municipalite | sort - total_clients | head 5 | rename municipalite as "Municipalité", total_clients as "Clients affectés"

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | eventstats latest(bis_id) as dernier_bis_id | where bis_id = dernier_bis_id | dedup id_panne | eval debut_epoch = strptime(date_debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval duree_minutes = round((now() - debut_epoch) / 60, 0) | eval coords = latitude . ", " . longitude | table date_debut municipalite adresse nombre_clients cause_desc statut date_fin_estimee duree_minutes coords | rename date_debut as "Début", municipalite as "Municipalité", adresse as "Adresse", nombre_clients as "Clients", cause_desc as "Cause", statut as "Statut", date_fin_estimee as "Fin estimée", duree_minutes as "Durée (min)", coords as "Coordonnées" | sort - Clients

panel.title: Évolution des pannes dans le temps

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | bin _time span=1h | stats dc(id_panne) as pannes_actives by _time | timechart span=1h max(pannes_actives) as "Pannes actives"

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | bin _time span=1h | stats latest(nombre_clients) as clients by _time, id_panne | stats sum(clients) as total_clients by _time | timechart span=1h max(total_clients) as "Clients sans électricité"

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:pannes region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | eventstats latest(bis_id) as dernier_bis_id by sourcetype | where bis_id = dernier_bis_id | stats latest(bis_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(bis_id) as bis_id, count as total_events by sourcetype | eval derniere_collecte = strftime(strptime(derniere_collecte, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval age_minutes = round((now() - strptime(derniere_collecte, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")) / 60, 0) | table sourcetype derniere_collecte age_minutes bis_id total_events | rename sourcetype as "Type", derniere_collecte as "Dernière Collecte", age_minutes as "Âge (min)", bis_id as "Version BIS", total_events as "Événements"
